creator: P.Szmytka@iem.pw.edu.pl
text:
Xorg server version 6.9 build from ports (x11-servers/xorg-server) doesn't recognize my video card (integrated Nvidia GeForce Go 6150) as supported.

Fix: 

Apply patch from one of linux distros xorg source package. Rebuild xorg-server.
You can find instructions on how to do it here:
http://people.fruitsalad.org/adridg/bobulate/index.php?/archives/320-Thank-you,-openSUSE-from-a-FreeBSD-guy.html
How-To-Repeat: purchase Nvidia GeForce Go 6150 based graphics card ;)
install x11-servers/xorg-server
choose 'nv' as display driver in xorg.conf
launch X
